title: Hydrolift
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Hydrolifts''' were modes of transportation, for being and objects, such as those used in [[Zabin Hive]].

They were also used in [[Space station/Legends|space stations]], such as in the '''hyrdolift wells''' of [[Fondor Spaceport]], to transport cargo between various levels.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Adventures 3: The Hostage Princess]]''
*[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' junior novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (junior novelization audiobook)|audiobook}} {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 3: Attack on Delrakkin]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 7: Ithorian Invasion]]''
